dataCouplingValues.name: none
dataCouplingValues.definition: No data dependency beyond static markup, children, or simple composition.

dataCouplingValues.name: static-props
dataCouplingValues.definition: Receives simple props such as string, number, boolean, image, or CTA object.

dataCouplingValues.name: schema-data
dataCouplingValues.definition: Receives structured data validated by a schema.

dataCouplingValues.name: api-data
dataCouplingValues.definition: Consumes, maps, or adapts data shaped like an API response.

dataCouplingValues.name: domain-model
dataCouplingValues.definition: Uses app-specific domain types such as Product, Variant, Customer, Inquiry, or Thread.

dataCouplingValues.name: state-machine
dataCouplingValues.definition: Depends on explicit workflow states, transitions, guards, or reducer/state machine rules.

dataCouplingValues.name: external-service
dataCouplingValues.definition: Connects to services such as Shopify, analytics, auth, cart, search, or backend APIs.
